strengths: Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates current relevance to the AI platform space
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective and multiple open-source projects shows a builder mindset across the full stack
~17 years of continuous engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput systems, and cloud tooling
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (April 2025 onwards) with no prior demonstrated AI/ML product ownership — the role requires recognized, proven depth in this space
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no academic or research background in ML/AI to compensate
Career trajectory is senior IC/staff engineer level; there is no evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory work, or cross-org technical leadership expected at this seniority
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically versatile and hands-on engineer with a genuine builder ethos, but he does not yet fit the profile of a Director-level AI strategist. The role demands recognized, demonstrated AI expertise — advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product futures, and inspiring adoption of cutting-edge AI — whereas his AI work is limited to a few months at his current role. His career has been primarily execution-focused at the senior/staff IC level with no evidence of the strategic advisory, executive-facing, or cross-organizational influence expected at this level. Without a stronger AI pedigree or a track record of director-level scope, the experience gap is material for this specific role.
